crmHub.subtitle: Pipeline, customers, and tasks — follow every opportunity in one place.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: A live snapshot of your business.

units.empty: No departments yet — add one to group your services and the AI agents that run them.

units.showOnWebsite: Show as a section on your website

units.landingHint: Its services appear as cards under this section on your public site.
units.hasAgents: Move or remove this department’s agents first.

pages.title: Website pages
pages.subtitle: Content pages (Terms, Instructions, Privacy…) shown inside your site — link them in the footer or the main menu.
pages.empty: No pages yet — add Terms, Instructions, or any content page for your website.
pages.contentHint: Markdown supported — headings (#), lists (-), bold (**text**), links.

home.title: NX iWork
home.badge: AI employees that run your business 24/7
home.subtitle: Build self-running companies with AI agents
home.lede: Hire AI agents, give them a persona and goals, and let them handle sales, support, and operations — around the clock.

hero.badge: The all-in-one platform for service businesses
hero.headline: Run and grow your business,
hero.lede: Online bookings, your own website, team & commissions, sales & invoices, and a smart AI assistant that answers customers and books for them — for clinics, salons, studios, and every service business.
hero.trust: No credit card required · Free to start · Live in minutes

sectors.title: Built for every service business
sectors.subtitle: If your customers book time or buy services, iWork runs it — whatever your field.

modules.title: Everything your business needs, in one place
modules.subtitle: Replace the patchwork of tools you use today with one connected platform — plus a smart AI assistant.

bookings.name: Online bookings
bookings.desc: A real-time calendar with availability, capacity, waitlists, and no-show handling.

website.name: Your own website
website.desc: A branded booking site + chat widget on your domain — services, team, and content pages.

team.name: Team & commissions
team.desc: Your staff, their schedules, and commissions calculated automatically from real sales.

sales.name: Sales & invoices
sales.desc: Orders, revenue, invoices, and a wallet — the full financial picture of your business.

crm.name: CRM & customers
crm.desc: Every lead, customer, and opportunity — captured from your site and followed up.

ai.name: Smart AI assistant
ai.desc: Answers customers in their dialect, checks availability, and books appointments for you.

website.title: A professional website — with online booking built in
website.desc: Every account gets a branded landing page and a smart chat assistant on your own domain. Customers browse your services, book appointments, and get answers — all captured into your CRM automatically.

points.p1: Services, team, and content pages on your custom domain
points.p2: Customers book directly — straight into your calendar & CRM
points.p3: Bilingual (Arabic / English), themed to your brand

features.title: The details that grow your business
features.subtitle: Beyond the basics — the tools that keep your calendar full and your customers coming back.

waitlist.title: Waitlists & no-shows
waitlist.desc: Full slots take a waitlist; a cancellation or no-show auto-promotes the next in line.

coupons.title: Discounts & coupons
coupons.desc: Run percentage or fixed offers on services, products, or bookings — redeemed at checkout.

inventory.title: Inventory & consumables
inventory.desc: Track the materials your services use, with low-stock alerts before you run out.

commissions.title: Automatic commissions
commissions.desc: Every completed order or booking feeds each staff member’s commission — no spreadsheets.

ai.title: An assistant that books
ai.desc: The AI answers in the customer’s dialect, verifies them, and only offers real open times.

unified.title: One holistic dashboard
unified.desc: Bookings, sales, team, and customers in a single view — bilingual and RTL-ready.

how.title: Live in three steps
how.subtitle: Set up your services once — the platform runs the rest.

s1.title: Add your services & team
s1.desc: List what you offer, set availability and prices, and add the people who deliver it.

s2.title: Publish your website
s2.desc: Your branded booking site + chat assistant go live on your own domain, in Arabic & English.

s3.title: Take bookings & grow
s3.desc: Customers book online 24/7, the AI handles chat, and every sale flows into your dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that scales with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you grow — no card needed to begin.
pricing.note: Prices in SAR. Every plan starts on free managed AI credits today.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

q1.q: What kind of business is this for?
q1.a: Any service or appointment business — clinics, salons, spas, studios, fitness, tutoring, repair, consulting, and more. If customers book time or buy services from you, it fits.

q2.q: Do I need a website already?
q2.a: No. Every account gets a professional booking website + chat assistant on your own domain, ready to publish in minutes.

q3.a: Yes — the whole platform and your public site work in Arabic and English, fully RTL-ready. The AI assistant even matches your customer’s dialect.

q4.q: Do I have to write code or prompts?
q4.a: No. Add your services and team in plain words; the platform configures itself around your business.

q5.q: How much does it cost to start?
q5.a: Free. Every account starts on managed AI credits with no credit card. Upgrade only when you grow.

cta.title: Run your whole business in one place
cta.subtitle: Set up your services, publish your booking site, and go live — free to start.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for service businesses.

mock.widgetGreeting: Hi! How can I help you today?
mock.widgetUser: Do you have an opening this evening?
mock.widgetAgent: Yes — 5:30 or 7:00 PM today. Shall I book you?

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Top up your balance and buy AI token credits or services.
wallet.unavailable: Wallet is unavailable for this account.
wallet.topUpUnavailable: Online top-up isn't configured yet. Please contact support to add balance.
wallet.invalidAmount: Enter an amount between 10 and 50,000 SAR.
wallet.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
wallet.creditsAbout: Token credits are the fuel that runs your AI employees — your automated team. Every task, reply, or chat your agents handle uses tokens, so keeping a balance keeps your team working around the clock.
wallet.creditsHelp: Pay {price} per 1,000,000 tokens, charged from your wallet.
wallet.insufficient: Not enough wallet balance — top up first.
wallet.topUpSuccess: Top-up successful — your balance has been updated.
wallet.topUpFailed: The payment didn't complete. No charge was made.

services.title: Services & add-ons
services.subtitle: Extend your workspace with services from the marketplace, paid from your wallet.
services.unavailable: Services are unavailable for this account.
services.insufficient: Not enough wallet balance — top up first.
services.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Your plan, upgrade options, and invoices.
subscription.unavailable: Subscription is unavailable for this account.
subscription.insufficient: Not enough wallet balance — top up first.
subscription.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
subscription.paySuccess: Payment successful — your plan is active.
subscription.payFailed: The payment didn't complete. No charge was made.

overview.routeNote: Agents route sensitive decisions to you for approval.
overview.approvalsSubtitle: Sensitive decisions your agents paused for. Approving wakes them to continue.
overview.noActivity: No activity yet. Create an agent and assign a task to get started.
overview.outOfTokens: Out of credits — renew your plan

checklist.title: Finish setting up
checklist.subtitle: {done} of {total} done — a few steps to a complete, on-brand presence.
checklist.done: All set! Your workspace is fully configured.

onboarding.title: Welcome — let's set up your company
onboarding.subtitle: A few short steps to tailor the platform to your business.
onboarding.languageStepSubtitle: Pick how the dashboard reads. You can switch anytime, and your public site can show both.
onboarding.companyNameEnHelp: Shown when a visitor switches language on your public site.
onboarding.usernameStepSubtitle: This becomes your public landing-page address. Choose carefully — it's how customers find you.
onboarding.usernameInvalid: Use 2–40 lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes
onboarding.planStepSubtitle: Start free on managed AI credits — no card needed now. Billing comes later.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: We tailor the experience to your sector.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Help us understand where you're heading.
onboarding.mainGoalPlaceholder: e.g. Automate customer responses and grow sales.
onboarding.visionPlaceholder: A short note about your mission and values.
onboarding.step4Subtitle: Double-check before we create your company.

errors.slugTaken: This slug is already taken, please choose another
errors.slugInvalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only
errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again

storefront.title: Storefront
storefront.subtitle: What visitors see on your public landing page.
storefront.logoHelp: Square image works best (PNG or SVG).
storefront.heroSubtitlePlaceholder: A short line about what you offer.

escalation.title: Alerts & escalation
escalation.subtitle: Connect a Telegram bot so agents can escalate angry customers and urgent issues to you instantly.
escalation.botTokenHelp: Create a bot with @BotFather and paste its token.
escalation.chatIdHelp: Your numeric chat ID (message @userinfobot to get it).
escalation.testFailed: Couldn't send. Check the token and chat ID.
escalation.howBody: When a customer message is detected as an angry complaint, the assigned agent is woken with a task and you get an instant Telegram alert with a summary.

email.title: Email sender
email.subtitle: Choose how emails to your customers are branded. All mail is delivered through the platform for reliability.
email.senderNameHelp: The name customers see in their inbox. Defaults to your company name.
email.replyToHelp: Where customer replies are delivered. Leave empty to use the platform default.
email.marketingHelp: Allow promotional (non-transactional) emails. Order confirmations and receipts always send.
email.howBody: Emails send from the platform's verified domain (best deliverability) with your sender name, and replies go to your reply-to address. A verified custom sending domain is planned for higher tiers.

domain.title: Custom domain
domain.subtitle: Serve your landing page on your own domain instead of {host}/{slug}.
domain.dnsHelp: Add one of these records at your domain registrar. Verification can take up to a few hours.
domain.cnameNote: Use CNAME for a subdomain (e.g. shop.yourbrand.com).
domain.aNote: Use an A record for a root domain (e.g. yourbrand.com).
domain.errorInvalid: Enter a valid domain like shop.yourbrand.com
domain.errorTaken: That domain is already connected to another account

localization.primaryLanguageHelp: Default language for the dashboard and public site.

branding.logoNote: These colors drive your public landing page — buttons, prices, and the hero.

company.name: Company name
company.brandVoiceHelp: How your brand speaks to customers (formal, friendly, playful...)

api.title: AI provider key (BYOK)
api.subtitle: Pick your engine (Gemini or Claude) and add your key. Your agents call it with your key — billed directly to you.
api.newKeyHelp: Stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM). The key is not shown again after saving.

errors.unauthorized: Key rejected by Anthropic — check your account
errors.rate_limited: Rate limited, try again in a minute

channels.subtitle: Let customers reach your AI agent on messaging apps. Messages route to the agent you choose; replies are sent back automatically.
channels.noAgents: Create a customer-facing agent first, then connect a channel.
channels.agentHelp: The customer-facing agent that replies on this channel.
channels.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this channel? Customers won’t be able to reach your agent there.

err.https_required: Connect from the live site (HTTPS required)
err.invalid_token: The credentials were rejected — double-check them
err.webhook_failed: Couldn’t register the webhook — check the token
err.phone_in_use: That WhatsApp number is already connected to another account

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.howTitle: How to get a bot token
telegram.how2: Pick a name + username; BotFather returns a token.
telegram.how3: Paste the token here, choose the agent, then Connect.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.tokenHelp: From your Meta app → WhatsApp → API Setup (the token is kept encrypted).
whatsapp.how1: In Meta for Developers, open your app → WhatsApp → API Setup.
whatsapp.how2: Copy the Phone number ID and a (permanent) access token.
whatsapp.how3: Paste them here, choose the agent, then Connect.
whatsapp.advancedNote: Requires a Meta Business app. One-click self-serve (Embedded Signup) is coming.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: The catalog your agents read from and that appears on your public page.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Orders from your public page or logged by your agents — handled automatically by the responsible agent.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.subtitle: Appointments your agents create or your customers book.

availability.title: Booking availability
availability.subtitle: Make a service bookable: set its duration and weekly hours. Customers can only book generated slots.
availability.noServices: No services yet. Add your services on the Services page first.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Each department is a unit of your business — it bundles the services you offer and the AI agents that run them, and appears as a section on your website.

agents.title: Employees
agents.subtitle: Your team of AI employees, organized by department.
agents.needDept: Create a department first, then assign employees to it.
agents.orgChartEmpty: Hire employees to see your org chart take shape.

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Enable only what your business needs — its tools appear in the menu and your agents use them automatically.

knowledge.title: Knowledge & triggers
knowledge.subtitle: Define your business answers so agents respond accurately, and make them act automatically on events.
knowledge.faqDesc: Agents read this via the search_faq tool — accurate answers instead of guessing.
knowledge.triggersDesc: "On event → an agent wakes up and runs a task" — requires the scheduler running on the server.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Everything your employees are working on: in progress, completed, and scheduled — with dates and run counts.

agentWork.title: Agent work
agentWork.subtitle: Everything your AI employees are doing — the live task queue and the calendar of scheduled runs.
agentWork.emptyQueue: No agent tasks yet. Assign work to an agent or set up a schedule.

data.title: Data
data.subtitle: Model your own data — patients, vehicles, contracts, cases — and your AI agents can read and update it.
data.emptyBody: Define your own record types with typed fields. Your agents get tools to read and write them — the foundation for any business, any sector.
data.deleteTypeConfirm: Delete “{name}” and all its records? This can’t be undone.
data.deleteRecordConfirm: Delete this record? This can’t be undone.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect third-party tools via MCP (Model Context Protocol). Their tools become available to your agents — governed by the same permissions.
integrations.emptyBody: Register a remote MCP server and its tools appear to your agents as mcp__{key}__… — connect any capability without a code change.
integrations.name: Name
integrations.authTokenHelp: Sent as a Bearer token to the server (kept encrypted).
integrations.removeConfirm: Remove “{name}”? Its tools stop being available to agents.
integrations.grantHint: Grant an agent “Use connected tools (MCP)” to let it use these.
integrations.namespaceHint: Tools appear to agents as mcp__{key}__{tool}.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Reusable capability bundles — instructions + tools — you author once and attach to any agent.
skills.emptyBody: A skill packages instructions and a set of tools. Attach it to agents so they all work the same way — change it once, every agent updates.
skills.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? Agents using it lose the skill.
skills.name: Name
skills.instructionsPlaceholder: How the agent should perform this skill — added to its system prompt.
skills.instructionsHelp: Injected into the system prompt of any agent that has this skill.

agentCreate.title: New employee
agentCreate.buildCustomHint: Start from scratch — you define everything.
agentCreate.templatesSubtitle: Pick a proven role — it comes with personality, automatic scenarios, and KPIs. Fine-tune anything after.

agentProfile.capNote: The per-agent cap protects the shared token bank.
agentProfile.capabilitiesNote: These change with the modules enabled for your company.
agentProfile.noKpis: No KPIs set for this employee.
agentProfile.chatSubtitle: Talk to this employee directly — internal mode, as the owner.
agentProfile.workingDesc: The short-term window — the most recent messages the agent keeps in context during a live chat.
agentProfile.episodicDesc: {count} past tasks & conversations stored in Postgres.
agentProfile.semanticDesc: {count} facts stored as vectors (pgvector) for recall.
agentProfile.memorySubtitle: What this employee has learned and remembers — stored as vectors for recall.
agentProfile.noMemory: No memories yet. They build up as the employee works.
agentProfile.archiveNote: Hides it from your workforce. Chat history and task records are kept — you can restore it later.

agentForm.name: Name
agentForm.personaPlaceholder: Who is this employee? How do they speak? What do they care about? e.g. A friendly support agent who answers briefly and clearly.
agentForm.personaHelp: This is their core personality. The clearer it is, the better they perform.
agentForm.jobDescriptionPlaceholder: What is this employee responsible for, and where do their boundaries lie? e.g. Qualify and follow up on sales leads, negotiate within the approved discount range, and hand off closed deals — do not issue invoices.
agentForm.jobDescriptionHelp: The constitution that governs their decisions — distinct from personality. Injected into their instructions.
agentForm.justifyTitle: Is this role worth an agent?
agentForm.justifyBody: If a responsibility is purely deterministic (a fixed rule, no judgment), let the system's workflow handle it. Give the agent the parts that need judgment, communication, or coordination.
agentForm.extraPlaceholder: Specific rules or limits, e.g. don't give discounts over 10%.
agentForm.autonomySuggestHint: Proposes only; you approve every action.
agentForm.autonomyAskHint: Acts on routine work; asks approval for sensitive decisions.
agentForm.autonomyAutopilotHint: Acts within policy; approval only for the exceptional.
agentForm.autonomyHelp: How much this employee may do on its own before pausing for you.
agentForm.creativityHelp: Lower = precise & consistent · Higher = more varied
agentForm.permissionsHelp: Capabilities grouped by department. Grant only what this role needs — an agent can be given capabilities from any department (cross-department). It can never use a tool that's off. Leave all off to allow every tool your modules enable.
agentForm.scenariosHelp: What this employee does automatically when a business event happens.
agentForm.thenPlaceholder: e.g. Welcome the customer and prepare a tailored offer.
agentForm.advisory: This looks like our {template} template — it comes ready with scenarios & KPIs.

models.haikuHint: Best for support and quick replies

agentForm.archetypeHelp: Sets the starting capabilities and whether this agent can talk to customers.

commissionsPage.empty: No active staff yet. Add staff and attribute orders/bookings to them to track commissions.
commissionsPage.noItems: No attributed orders or bookings this month.

archive.confirm: Archive this agent? You can restore it later.

order.empty: No orders. Orders coming from your public page appear here automatically.

salesPage.title: Sales & financials
salesPage.subtitle: Revenue, orders, and invoices across your business.

guardrails.title: Guardrails
guardrails.subtitle: The boundaries your AI workforce operates within — what they can decide alone, and what pauses for you.
guardrails.sensitiveDesc: Agents pause and ask you before acting on a sensitive call (request_approval).
guardrails.reviewDesc: Drafts wait for your OK before they’re sent to a customer.
guardrails.spendDesc: Money moves above this amount need your approval.
guardrails.capDesc: Set by your plan — keeps one agent from draining the shared bank.
guardrails.schedulerOn: Agents act on their schedules and event triggers.
guardrails.schedulerOff: Paused — no agent runs until you switch this back on.
guardrails.runHint: Runs due schedules + pending autonomous tasks for your workforce right now.

agentActivity.empty: No activity yet — this agent hasn’t picked up any work.

outputs.title: Agent Workspace
outputs.subtitle: Everything your AI team delivered — review, approve, and publish.
outputs.empty: No deliverables yet. Background agents (marketing, finance, operations) will deliver reports, plans, and content here.

errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or head back to your dashboard.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
errors.storefrontNotFound: This business page doesn’t exist or is no longer available.

taskMgr.added: Task added to the task list.
taskMgr.runSuccess: The agent completed the task successfully.

taskMgr.connectError: Failed to connect to the server.

agentSchedules.subtitle: Let this agent run a recurring task automatically on time.
agentSchedules.taskPlaceholder: Read this week's sales from the CRM and write a brief report.

chatClient.connectError: Failed to connect to the server.
chatClient.errNoKey: The AI key hasn't been added yet. Add it from settings.

chatClient.errVertexNotConfigured: The AI service (Vertex) isn't configured. Contact support.
chatClient.errDecryptFailed: Couldn't read the key. Re-enter it from settings.
chatClient.errProviderError: An error occurred from the AI provider. Try again.

triggerMgr.namePlaceholder: e.g. Follow up with the new lead
triggerMgr.taskPlaceholder: Reach out to the new lead and prepare a suitable offer.

agentScenarios.title: Scenarios (auto-action rules)
agentScenarios.subtitle: Define what this agent does automatically when an event happens in your business.
agentScenarios.namePlaceholder: e.g. Follow up with the new lead
agentScenarios.whatPlaceholder: Reach out to the lead, understand their need, and prepare a suitable offer.
agentScenarios.empty: No scenarios. Add a rule so the agent acts automatically on events.

faqMgr.questionPlaceholder: e.g. How long is shipping to Riyadh?
faqMgr.empty: No questions yet. Add your customers' frequent questions so the agents answer them accurately.

productForm.unlimitedStockHint: Turn it off to set a quantity

chatEmptyState.title: Hire your first AI agent

chatEmptyState.addKeyPrefix: To actually run the agent, add the AI key from
chatEmptyState.created: First AI agent created: Suha (Customer Service)
chatEmptyState.createError: Couldn't create the agent. Try again.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.subtitle: Default opening hours for the whole business. Any service without its own schedule uses these. Add closures for holidays.
businessHours.saveError: Couldn’t save. Check the times and try again.
businessHours.badWindow: End time must be after start time.
businessHours.holidaysHint: Days the business is fully closed — no bookings are offered.
businessHours.inheritNote: Services that have their own availability keep it; only services without a schedule inherit these hours.
businessHours.policyHint: Shown to customers when they book and on your service pages.
businessHours.policyPlaceholder: e.g. Please cancel at least 24 hours before your appointment.

reminders.title: Booking reminders
reminders.subtitle: Automatic emails to customers — a confirmation when they book, and a reminder before their appointment. Sent from your business brand.
reminders.confirmationLabel: Send a confirmation when a booking is made
reminders.confirmationHint: The customer gets an instant email confirming the service, date, and reference.
reminders.reminderLabel: Send a reminder before the appointment
reminders.reminderHint: A friendly nudge to reduce no-shows.
reminders.hoursBefore: Send the reminder this many hours before
reminders.hoursOption: {count, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} before
reminders.channelNote: Reminders are sent by email today. SMS & WhatsApp channels are coming.

reviewsPublic.submitted: Thank you! Your review will appear once it’s approved.
reviewsPublic.rateLimited: You’ve already submitted a few reviews.

reviewsMgr.title: Reviews
reviewsMgr.subtitle: Moderate customer reviews — publish the good ones to your website, hide the rest.
reviewsMgr.empty: No reviews yet. They’ll appear here when customers rate you.
